[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00110010 3
1 10011100 4
2 10110011 5
3 11110110 6
4 00000000 a
5 00000000 a
6 00000000 a
7 01010000 2

70 10100110 4
